overview: Spider Mummy is a Normal-class Undead/Beast monster found in Crypt, Goblin Cave, Inferno, Ruins. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): -75 HP, 11 physical damage, 250 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 1, MaxImpactEndurance 5. Has a Staggered reaction in its ability set. 4 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Attack1 at 180% ratio (198 base damage). Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilityy: Attack1 Nightmare.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 4 melee attacks. Attack1 (180%), Attack2 (130%), Attack3 (130%), and more.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Paralyze
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Paralyze icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: Has Stagger Reaction (ImpactRes 1, Endurance 5)
strategies.description: This monster has a Staggered ability in its ability set, meaning it has a stagger reaction animation. ImpactResistance: 1, MaxImpactEndurance: 5.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Fire, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Fire (-2500), Divine (-1500). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 150
strategies.description: Has 150 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Nightmare Gains: Attack1 Nightmare
strategies.description: Nightmare grade has 1 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Attack1 Nightmare. These change the fight dynamics in Nightmare.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster
Nightmare gains 1 exclusive abilities: Attack1 Nightmare

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
